name: Iso11783PDDUpdateDeviceDescription
title: Iso11783PDDUpdateDeviceDescription
syntax: long Iso11783PDDUpdateDeviceDescription( dword ecuHandle, char deviceCfgPath [] );
description: The function updates the current device description object pool at runtime.
Only the device object and objects of type DeviceValuePresentation of the specified file are transmitted.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU. The handle must be created with Iso11783CreateECU beforehand or ZERO for general parameters.

parameters.name: deviceCfgPath
parameters.description: File name of the device configuration file. The file must be located in the directory of the CANoe configuration.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
